name: Equipment and R&D Requisition
summary: Ausrustung ist missionskritisch, oft experimentell und absichtlich unzuverlaessig.

mechanics.issuance_rule: Gear may exceed user clearance as a controlled test.
mechanics.malfunction_policy: Unexpected behavior is normal and narratively useful.
mechanics.liability: User is responsible for damage, loss, and unauthorized usage.
mechanics.r_and_d_hook: Prototype side effects are an explicit plot driver.
